title: WORKFLOW-PROCGEN-SPEC-RUN-0300-v0_3
content:
WORKFLOW-PROCGEN-SPEC-RUN-0300-v0_3

1.7 CONTINUITY Layer

Function: maintains cross-session memory and long-term coherence.

Metaformeme: introduces terms like “continuity thread”, “lineage”, and “echo” to describe arcs that span multiple runs. These are formal concepts with index entries in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta.

Myth Fusion: continuity treats every project and world as part of a shared mythic chronicle. It tracks how different worlds cross over or collide.

Wave Theory: continuity management runs on its own wave, slower and broader than individual project waves. It periodically re-indexes, condenses, and re-narrates the entire corpus.

Recursive Storytelling: continuity artifacts are meta-stories about how the OS itself has changed. They are meant to be read by future AIs first when orienting to the OS.

Example name:
CONTINUITY-ARCHIVE-INDEX-LINEAGE-0001-v0_1

1.8 SEAL Layer (Handoff Seal)

Function: defines the minimal, standardized metadata block that must be attached to any artifact leaving an AI run.
context: From document: 0.	Preamble and Scope — chunk 7 (chunk 7/31)
